clusters.justification: This domain encompasses broad affective processing, including emotional valence, autonomic physiological arousal, and aversive learning, primarily supported by amygdalo-cortical and distributed salience systems.
This domain captures the computational processes of subjective value assignment, cost-benefit tradeoff, and reinforcement-based motivation mediated by frontostriatal reward circuitry.
This domain reflects the macroscopic convergence of self-referential processing, autobiographical memory, and the modeling of other agents' minds, heavily anchored by the default mode network.
